title: Custom read models registered via withReadModel run in pre-ready phase before JOB_READ_READY fires while processors run post-ready
content: The reactor distinguishes between read models and processors by execution phase. Read models registered via `ReactorBuilder.withReadModel()` implement `IReadModel` with `indexOperations(operations: OperationWithContext[])` and run in the pre-ready phase -- they complete before `JOB_READ_READY` fires. This ensures derived views are consistent before reads. Processors registered via `ProcessorManager` run in the post-ready phase, after the job is marked complete. The reactor's internal components include `readModelCoordinator` (dispatches operations to all read models), `processorManager` (routes operations to user-defined processors), `documentView` (maintains document snapshots for reads), and `documentIndexer` (tracks parent/child relationships).
description: Read models implement IReadModel.indexOperations() and complete before job is marked ready; processors run after via ProcessorManager.
